mapper.select:
SELECT A.SALES_PROD_ID, A.SALES_PROD_NAME, A.LIST_PRICE, A.COST_PRICE, A.VAT_RATE, A.SALE_START_DT, A.SALE_END_DT, A.EXPOSURE_STATUS_CD, A.SELLER_MEMBER_ID, M.COMPANY_NAME AS SELLER_NAME, A.SUMMARY, A.MD_COMMENT, A.REG_DT, A.MOD_DT FROM TB_SALES_PRODUCT A LEFT JOIN TB_MEMBER M ON A.SELLER_MEMBER_ID = M.MEMBER_ID
ORDER BY A.SALES_PROD_ID DESC LIMIT #{recordCountPerPage} OFFSET #{firstIndex}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TB_SALES_PRODUCT A LEFT JOIN TB_MEMBER M ON A.SELLER_MEMBER_ID = M.MEMBER_ID

SELECT P.SALES_PROD_ID, P.SALES_PROD_NAME, P.LIST_PRICE, P.COST_PRICE, P.VAT_RATE, CAST(P.LIST_PRICE * P.VAT_RATE / 100 AS UNSIGNED) AS VAT_AMOUNT, P.SALE_START_DT, P.SALE_END_DT, P.EXPOSURE_STATUS_CD, P.SELLER_MEMBER_ID, SM.COMPANY_NAME AS SELLER_NAME, P.SUMMARY, P.MD_COMMENT, P.REG_DT, P.MOD_DT, -- Detail Info D.DETAIL_HTML, D.PAYMENT_INFO, D.DELIVERY_INFO, D.RETURN_INFO, D.REFUND_INFO, -- Composition Info PC.COMPONENT_PROD_ID, PC.SORT_ORDER AS COMP_SORT_ORDER, BP.COMPONENT_PROD_NAME AS BUNDLE_PRODUCT_NAME, BP.SALE_TYPE_CD AS BUNDLE_SALE_TYPE, ST_SALE.CODE_NAME AS BUNDLE_SALE_TYPE_NAME, BP.LIST_PRICE AS BUNDLE_SALE_PRICE, BP.COST_PRICE AS BUNDLE_COST_PRICE, CAST(BP.LIST_PRICE * BP.VAT_RATE / 100 AS UNSIGNED) AS BUNDLE_VAT_AMOUNT, BP.SALE_START_DT AS BUNDLE_SALE_START_DT, BP.SALE_END_DT AS BUNDLE_SALE_END_DT, BP.EXPOSURE_STATUS_CD AS BUNDLE_DISPLAY_YN, BM.COMPANY_NAME AS BUNDLE_SELLER_NAME, ST_STAT.CODE_NAME AS BUNDLE_SALE_STATUS_NAME, ST_STORE.CODE_NAME AS BUNDLE_STORAGE_TYPE_NAME, ST_PROC.CODE_NAME AS BUNDLE_PROCESS_TYPE_NAME, ST_CUT.CODE_NAME AS BUNDLE_DIVISION_TYPE_NAME, BP.REG_DT AS BUNDLE_REG_DT, BP.MOD_DT AS BUNDLE_MOD_DT, -- Image Info IMG.IMG_ID, IMG.IMG_URL, IMG.SORT_ORDER AS IMG_SORT_ORDER, IMG.IS_MAIN_YN FROM TB_SALES_PRODUCT P LEFT JOIN TB_MEMBER SM ON P.SELLER_MEMBER_ID = SM.MEMBER_ID LEFT JOIN TB_SALES_PRODUCT_DETAIL D ON P.SALES_PROD_ID = D.SALES_PROD_ID LEFT JOIN TB_SALES_PRODUCT_COMP PC ON P.SALES_PROD_ID = PC.SALES_PROD_ID AND PC.USE_YN = 'Y' AND PC.DEL_YN = 'N' LEFT JOIN TB_COMPONENT_PRODUCT BP ON PC.COMPONENT_PROD_ID = BP.COMPONENT_PROD_ID LEFT JOIN TB_MEMBER BM ON BP.SELLER_MEMBER_ID = BM.MEMBER_ID LEFT JOIN TB_CODE ST_SALE ON BP.SALE_TYPE_CD = ST_SALE.CODE_ID AND ST_SALE.CODE_GROUP_ID = 'SALE_TYPE' LEFT JOIN TB_CODE ST_STAT ON BP.SALE_STATUS_CD = ST_STAT.CODE_ID AND ST_STAT.CODE_GROUP_ID = 'SALE_STATUS' LEFT JOIN TB_CODE ST_STORE ON BP.STORAGE_TYPE_CD = ST_STORE.CODE_ID AND ST_STORE.CODE_GROUP_ID = 'STORAGE_TYPE' LEFT JOIN TB_CODE ST_PROC ON BP.PROCESS_TYPE_CD = ST_PROC.CODE_ID AND ST_PROC.CODE_GROUP_ID = 'PROCESS_TYPE' LEFT JOIN TB_CODE ST_CUT ON BP.CUT_TYPE_CD = ST_CUT.CODE_ID AND ST_CUT.CODE_GROUP_ID = 'CUT_TYPE' LEFT JOIN TB_SALES_PRODUCT_IMAGE IMG ON P.SALES_PROD_ID = IMG.SALES_PROD_ID AND IMG.USE_YN = 'Y' AND IMG.DEL_YN = 'N' WHERE P.SALES_PROD_ID = #{value} ORDER BY PC.SORT_ORDER, IMG.SORT_ORDER
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TB_SALES_PRODUCT ( SALES_PROD_CODE, SALES_PROD_NAME, LIST_PRICE, COST_PRICE, VAT_RATE, SALE_START_DT, SALE_END_DT, EXPOSURE_STATUS_CD, SALE_STATUS_CD, SELLER_MEMBER_ID, SUMMARY, MD_COMMENT, REG_ID, REG_DT, MOD_DT ) VALUES ( CONCAT('SP', DATE_FORMAT(NOW(), '%Y%m%d%H%i%s'), FLOOR(RAND()*1000)), -- 임시 코드 생성 #{productName}, #{salePrice}, #{costPrice}, #{vatRate}, #{saleStartDate}, #{saleEndDate}, #{displayYn}, 'SALE', -- 기본값 #{sellerId}, #{productSummary}, #{mdComment}, #{regId}, NOW(), NOW() )

INSERT INTO TB_SALES_PRODUCT_DETAIL ( SALES_PROD_ID, DETAIL_HTML, PAYMENT_INFO, DELIVERY_INFO, RETURN_INFO, REFUND_INFO, REG_ID, REG_DT ) VALUES ( #{productNo}, #{description}, #{paymentInfo}, #{shippingInfo}, #{exchangeReturnInfo}, #{refundInfo}, #{regId}, NOW() )
mapper.update: UPDATE TB_SALES_PRODUCT SET SALES_PROD_NAME = #{productName}, LIST_PRICE = #{salePrice}, COST_PRICE = #{costPrice}, VAT_RATE = #{vatRate}, SALE_START_DT = #{saleStartDate}, SALE_END_DT = #{saleEndDate}, EXPOSURE_STATUS_CD = #{displayYn}, SELLER_MEMBER_ID = #{sellerId}, SUMMARY = #{productSummary}, MD_COMMENT = #{mdComment}, MOD_DT = NOW() WHERE SALES_PROD_ID = #{productNo}

INSERT INTO TB_SALES_PRODUCT_DETAIL ( SALES_PROD_ID, DETAIL_HTML, PAYMENT_INFO, DELIVERY_INFO, RETURN_INFO, REFUND_INFO, REG_ID, REG_DT ) VALUES ( #{productNo}, #{description}, #{paymentInfo}, #{shippingInfo}, #{exchangeReturnInfo}, #{refundInfo}, #{regId}, NOW() ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE DETAIL_HTML = #{description}, PAYMENT_INFO = #{paymentInfo}, DELIVERY_INFO = #{shippingInfo}, RETURN_INFO = #{exchangeReturnInfo}, REFUND_INFO = #{refundInfo}, MOD_DT = NOW()
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TB_SALES_PRODUCT_COMP ( SALES_PROD_ID, COMPONENT_PROD_ID, SORT_ORDER, COMP_QTY, REG_ID ) VALUES ( #{productNo}, #{bundleId}, #{sortOrder}, 1, -- 기본 수량 1 'SYSTEM' )

INSERT INTO TB_SALES_PRODUCT_IMAGE ( SALES_PROD_ID, IMG_URL, SORT_ORDER, IS_MAIN_YN, USE_YN, REG_ID, REG_DT, MOD_DT ) VALUES ( #{salesProdId}, #{imgUrl}, #{sortOrder}, #{isMainYn}, 'Y', #{regId}, NOW(), NOW() )
mapper.select: SELECT IMG_ID as imgId, SALES_PROD_ID as salesProdId, IMG_URL as imgUrl, SORT_ORDER as sortOrder, IS_MAIN_YN as isMainYn FROM TB_SALES_PRODUCT_IMAGE WHERE SALES_PROD_ID = #{value} ORDER BY SORT_ORDER ASC
